title: Ruth Concannon
compiled_truth: Ruth Concannon is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-26 to 2002-06-25), Ruth Concannon sent 114 and received 459 emails, totalling 573 interactions.
